programs.name: Ultra Swim 5
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Badminton: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills through play with recreational badminton. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Ball Hockey: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this non-ice version of hockey played with a ball, you will learn basics like passing, shooting and stick handling as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.Equipment: Players must bring a CSA-approved helmet and hockey gloves.

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Tae Kwon Do - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.
programs.location: Gus Ryder Pool And Health Club

programs.name: Ultra Youth Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water and improve your swimming skills. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Ultra Youth Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water and improve your swimming skills. Develop front and back crawl, elementary backstroke and staying afloat in water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick, surface dives and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Youth 1.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 3
programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.

programs.name: Basketball: Recreational (Men)
programs.description: Develop skills through play with recreational basketball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction. This activity is for all men.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

While exploring and gaining independence at this level, you will learn the mechanics of front crawl, back crawl and diving as you continue to enhance your deep-water techniques, survival and self-rescue skills. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adapted Ultra Swim - Beginner. Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or aiscw@toronto.ca. Please Note: External support persons attending with you shall enter the water as required and can attend at no charge.

programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.

programs.name: Basketball: Recreational (Men)
programs.description: Develop skills through play with recreational basketball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction. This activity is for all men.

programs.name: Tae Kwon Do Learn to Move
programs.description: Learn to move in this martial arts program where you will learn fundamental martial art skills, build confidence, learn etiquette and rules and learn to respect the sport, the instructor and other participants.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Tiny Tots Swim
programs.description: Would your little one enjoy splashing around and getting comfortable in the water at their own pace? This 15-minute activity provides personal swim instruction with a one-on-one ratio.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side gliding and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll.  Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training.  Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training. Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. This activity is for all girls.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 7
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives, eggbeater kick, front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and breaststroke. Learn shallow dives into deep water and treading water while fully clothed. Work towards a continuous swim of 200 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 6.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Zumba®
programs.description: Latin dance and music inspire this fun and energetic cardio workout. Using high and low-impact steps and aerobic movements, you will dance your way to new fitness heights.

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side gliding and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll.  Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training.  Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training. Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. This activity is for all girls.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 7
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives, eggbeater kick, front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and breaststroke. Learn shallow dives into deep water and treading water while fully clothed. Work towards a continuous swim of 200 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 6.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Zumba®
programs.description: Latin dance and music inspire this fun and energetic cardio workout. Using high and low-impact steps and aerobic movements, you will dance your way to new fitness heights.

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the keyboard with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Piano
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to piano. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Singing - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal singing instruction with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn the importance of proper posture and warm-ups as well as voice projection.

programs.name: Pickleball: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In pickleball, a fast-moving racquet sport that combines elements from tennis, badminton and table tennis, you will learn basics like serving, hitting and rallying as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Pottery
programs.description: Create with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

programs.name: Pottery
programs.description: Create with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 1: Penguin
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Learn how to enter and exit the pool, go underwater, breathe effectively and float with assistance.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 2: Stingray
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop entering and exiting the pool, bobbing, and floating without assistance. Learn front swim. Work towards a continuous swim of three metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Preschool Swim 1 or Guardian Swim 3.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 2: Stingray
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop entering and exiting the pool, bobbing, and floating without assistance. Learn front swim. programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Swim Fit
programs.description: The course name says it all—Swim Fit. In this activity, you’ll not only get instruction on technique and stroke improvement, but you’ll also get the opportunity to perform interval drills to increase your swimming performance and endurance.Prerequisite: Must be able to swim two continuous lengths of the pool or 50 metres.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side gliding and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll.  Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training.  Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training. Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. This activity is for all girls.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 7
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives, eggbeater kick, front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and breaststroke. Learn shallow dives into deep water and treading water while fully clothed. Work towards a continuous swim of 200 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 6.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 8 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives with underwater swimming, interval training, object support and all strokes. Work towards a continuous swim of 300 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 7.

programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Class size is limited to four participants. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Pottery: Sculpture
programs.description: Create sculptures with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

programs.name: Recreation Discovery
programs.description: Embark on a recreational discovery with a focus on developing skills through creative, active and interactive activities. Programming will include storytelling, theme-based games, crafts, music and physical activity, while having fun with new friends.

programs.name: Science: Scientific Adventures with Caregiver
programs.description: Jump into the adventures of science. Here, stories, activities and fun and exciting experiments teach basic science knowledge and skills, while hands-on play and the use of your imagination will help you to explore science mysteries. A caregiver must actively participate in this activity.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement skills such as agility, balance and coordination. In soccer you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading, as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement skills such as agility, balance and coordination. In soccer you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading, as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Dance: Creative Movement with Caregiver
programs.description: Express yourself creatively with dance. Pairing basic movements with imagination, learn dance elements like body awareness and rhythm through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography. A caregiver must actively participate in this activity.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Boys)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all boys.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Girls)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. programs.name: Bronze Star and Basic First Aid (CPR A)
programs.description: This course develops swimming proficiency, lifesaving skill and personal fitness. Candidates refine their stroke mechanics, acquire self-rescue skills, and apply fitness principles in training workouts. Bronze Star is excellent preparation for success in Bronze Medallion and provides a fun introduction to lifesaving sport.Prerequisite: Minimum age of 9 years old.

programs.name: Cooking
programs.description: Let’s get creative in the kitchen and have some fun. In this introduction to cooking, you will learn about healthy foods, the importance of safety and practice basic skills like mixing and measuring with easy-to-follow recipes that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Baking
programs.description: Whether you are making breads, desserts or pastries; something savoury or sweet, this activity will help you reach new culinary delights. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain confidence in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Cooking: Creative Chefs
programs.description: Small cooks with big imaginations will have the chance to take over the kitchen. Starting with cooking basics, you will learn about healthy foods and the importance of kitchen safety, then through hands-on practice you will learn how to mix and measure, use cool kitchen tools and follow recipes that explore fun flavours that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Vegetarian
programs.description: Get creative with great ingredients like fruits, vegetables and grains. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain comfort in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Basics
programs.description: Combining influences of lyrical, jazz, ballet, hip hop and modern dance this activity is the perfect for beginners. Learn basic positions, body awareness and proper technique through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.
